name: agentx-video-studio
description: Programmatic persona demo videos for the AgentX landing page (Remotion).

scripts.render:all: npm run render:pm && npm run render:architect && npm run render:ux
scripts.render:posters: remotion still PMDemo out/pm-poster.png --frame=30 && remotion still ArchitectDemo out/architect-poster.png --frame=30 && remotion still UXDemo out/ux-poster.png --frame=30
